result.summary: mParticle exposes multiple authenticated REST APIs centered on `api.mparticle.com` plus an npm-distributed `mp` CLI; no public GraphQL or MCP server surfaced.
result.description: mParticle is a customer data platform for collecting, managing, and activating customer event and profile data. It provides APIs and tooling for identity resolution, profile access, data governance, and platform configuration.

mp_api_client.label: mParticle API credentials (client ID + client secret)
mp_api_client.setup: In the mParticle dashboard, create API credentials under the key management area described in [Key Management](https://docs.mparticle.com/developers/apis/platform/key-management/). The docs for multiple APIs state you must first set up an API user/credentials there, then exchange the `client_id` and `client_secret` for a bearer token at `https://sso.auth.mparticle.com/oauth/token`.
